name: Daily Auto Commit

on:
  schedule:
    # Ini adalah format Cron. 
    # "0 0 * * *" artinya setiap hari jam 00:00 UTC (jam 7 pagi WIB)
    - cron: '0 0 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch: # Agar kamu bisa jalankan manual lewat tombol di GitHub

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repo
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Make changes
        run: |
          for i in {1..20}; do
            echo "Auto commit ke-$i pada $(date)" >> bot_log.txt
            git config --local user.email "hilman.raz@gmail.com"
            git config --local user.name "Auto Bot"
            git add bot_log.txt
            git commit -m "bot: daily auto-commit $i"
          done

      - name: Push changes
        uses: ad-m/github-push-action@master
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          branch: main
